title: sum over a column type date
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, today DATE, value INT);
INSERT INTO test (id, today, value) VALUES (1, '2023-10-01', 10);
INSERT INTO test (id, today, value) VALUES (2, '2023-10-02', 20);
SELECT SUM(DATEDIFF(today, '1970-01-01')) AS sum_days FROM test;
key_bug_features: sum function on date column type
